description: A single geolocated journey from origin to destination. Visual lifecycle (launch, flight, impact) is owned by the visualizer, not this schema. magnitude/priority/velocity are 0–100 display scales, not SI units.

correlationId.description: Groups related journeys (e.g. OTel traceId via adapter).

destination.description: Where the journey ends (GeoJSON Point, lon-first WGS84).

emittedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the producer emitted this event.

magnitude.description: Intrinsic scale of the event (blast yield, packet size, shipment tonnage). Theme maps to arc thickness / impact radius.

metadata.description: Theme-specific extras. Themes that know a key use it; others ignore it.

origin.description: Where the journey started (GeoJSON Point, lon-first WGS84).

priority.description: Urgency relative to other events. Theme maps to glow / color intensity.

velocity.description: Relative travel speed (display scale). Theme maps to arc flight duration. Default 50 is middle-of-the-road.

title: GeoEvent
